info.name: Soracom Lagoon API
info.description: Manage Soracom Lagoon (dashboard and visualization) users, plans, and licenses.

item.name: Get a custom icon image link of Soracom Lagoon Console

request.description: Get a custom icon image link of Soracom Lagoon Console.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Get the status of active Soracom Lagoon license packs

request.description: Get the status of active Soracom Lagoon license packs.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Update the quantities for license packs of Soracom Lagoon

request.description:
Update the quantities for license packs of Soracom Lagoon.

**Warning**: This API must be called with the root user credentials. The quantities for license packs of Soracom Lagoon cannot be updated with SAM user credentials.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Update the plan of Soracom Lagoon

request.description:
Update the plan of Soracom Lagoon.

**Warning**: This API must be called with the root user credentials. The plan of Lagoon cannot be updated with SAM user credentials.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description:
Register (activate) Soracom Lagoon.

**Warning**: This API must be called with the root user credentials. Lagoon cannot be registered with SAM user credentials.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description:
Terminate (deactivate) Soracom Lagoon.

**Warning**: This API must be called with the root user credentials. Lagoon cannot be terminated with SAM user credentials.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
